angles.name: rock legend birthday
angles.copy: Mick Jagger turns 73, we're playing his greatest hits all day on Nation 60s and Nation Rocks

events.title: MTV launched 47 years ago
events.blurb: MTV was launched on August 1, 1981, with the first video being Buggles - Video Killed The Radio Star

angles.name: mtv anniversary
angles.copy: MTV launched 47 years ago, we're playing the biggest hits from the 80s on Nation 80s

events.title: Oasis release Definitely Maybe 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album Definitely Maybe on August 5, 1994

angles.name: oasis album anniversary
angles.copy: Oasis released Definitely Maybe 32 years ago, we're playing their biggest hits on Nation 90s

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place on August 15, 1969

angles.name: woodstock anniversary
angles.copy: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, we're playing the biggest hits from the 60s on Nation 60s

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis' death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977

angles.name: elvis tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll on the anniversary of his death, we're playing his greatest hits on Nation 60s and Nation Easy

events.title: Tupac Shakur shot dead 30 years ago
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot dead in Las Vegas on September 1, 1996

angles.name: tupac anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur 30 years after his tragic death, we're playing his biggest hits on Nation 90s

events.title: The Beatles release Abbey Road 57 years ago

angles.name: abbey road anniversary

angles.name: chrissie hynde birthday
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde turns 75, we're playing The Pretenders' greatest hits on Nation 80s

angles.name: liam gallagher birthday

angles.copy: John Lennon released Imagine 51 years ago, we're playing the album in full on Nation 70s
